title: wolfhsm: implement digest::Update+FixedOutput for HsmSha types
description:
## Why
The plan called for `HsmSha256`, `HsmSha384`, `HsmSha512` types implementing `digest::Update + FixedOutput`. Currently only a one-shot `Client::sha256()` exists. Without the trait impls, the HSM SHA cannot be used anywhere the RustCrypto `Digest` trait is expected.

## What needs to be done
- Add `HsmSha256<'a> { client: &'a mut Client, state: wc_Sha256 }` in `crypto/sha.rs`
- Implement `digest::Update` using `wh_Client_Sha256UpdateRequest`
- Implement `digest::FixedOutput` using `wh_Client_Sha256FinalRequest`
- Repeat for SHA-384 and SHA-512
- The one-shot `Client::sha256()` method can stay as a convenience

## Acceptance criteria
- `HsmSha256` satisfies `digest::Digest` (which is `Update + FixedOutput + Default + ...`)
- Test: streaming hash of split input matches one-shot hash of same input (use sha2 crate as oracle)
